rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NELLIE GREEN JOHNSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Preliminary Tentative: Examiner still does not have the required courtesy copy of the Supplement filed 03/10/2020. File stamped single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 no later than 2pm on 04/28/20 at the Superior Court. (LRSF 2.7, 14.6).
